creator: gerard_seibert@outlook.com
text:
(In reply to tech-lists from comment #167)

I really wish that this could be corrected and included with the release of FreeBSD version 13. I know it will never happen; however, it would be nice to at least hope that it gets into 13.1 anyway. I am stuck at version 11. I don't build custom kernels. I download the 'bootonly' disc and start from there on a clean HD. I hate having a lot of leftover clutter hanging around.
